name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups flour (you can use part whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together: flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the wet ingredients: apple sauce, eggs, vanilla, and milk to the dry mixture. Stir until just combined; do not overmix.
3. Lightly spray a 9" x 13" pan or a 10-inch tube pan with vegetable oil (such as Pam).
4. Sprinkle the wheat germ evenly across the bottom of the prepared pan.
5. Pour in the carrot cake batter and smooth the top with a spatula.
6. Bake for about an hour in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C). A tube pan may take longer than a rectangular one to bake throughly.
7. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center of the cake; it should come out clean when fully baked.
Warnings: This recipe is heavy but very flavorful and freezes well.
